mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.organization_members (organization_seq, user_seq, role) VALUES (#{organizationSeq}, #{userSeq}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT organization_seq FROM event.organization_members WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY CASE WHEN role = 'owner' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, created_at ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
